CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Steve Kremer, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiffs: Mabel Lena Castro and Elise Marie Sommerville.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mabel Lena Castro, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: New Horizons Computer Learning Centers, Inc., a California Corporation as follows:
Damages $13,500.00
Prejudgment Interest $2,867.00
Attorney's Fees $2,200.00
Costs $357.22, for a total of $18,724.22
Judgment signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Continued To Nov-14-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
